query: SELECT id, name, slug FROM stores WHERE name LIKE '%Spar%'; SELECT id, name, slug FROM product_categories ORDER BY name; SELECT COUNT(*) as product_count FROM products WHERE store_id = (SELECT id FROM stores WHERE name LIKE '%Spar%' LIMIT 1);
